scripts.setup:watnot: cd watnot && npm install && npm run build
scripts.annotate:tokenize: wasmtime --dir . watnot/build/watnot.wasm build/tokenize.wasm.map build/tokenize.wat build/tokenize.offsets.json src/tokenize.ts src/lexer.ts src/vocabulary.ts src/bpe.ts > build/tokenize.annotated.wat
scripts.annotate:train-bpe: wasmtime --dir . watnot/build/watnot.wasm build/train-bpe.wasm.map build/train-bpe.wat build/train-bpe.offsets.json src/train-bpe.ts src/lexer.ts src/vocabulary.ts src/bpe.ts src/io.ts > build/train-bpe.annotated.wat
scripts.annotate:train: wasmtime --dir . watnot/build/watnot.wasm build/train.wasm.map build/train.wat build/train.offsets.json src/train.ts src/lexer.ts src/vocabulary.ts src/bpe.ts src/io.ts src/config.ts src/model.ts src/tensor.ts src/checkpoint.ts > build/train.annotated.wat
scripts.annotate:infer: wasmtime --dir . watnot/build/watnot.wasm build/infer.wasm.map build/infer.wat build/infer.offsets.json src/infer.ts src/lexer.ts src/vocabulary.ts src/bpe.ts src/io.ts src/config.ts src/model.ts src/tensor.ts src/checkpoint.ts > build/infer.annotated.wat
scripts.corpus: npm run build:tokenize && npm run build:train-bpe && npm run build:train && npm run build:infer && npm run wat:tokenize && npm run wat:train-bpe && npm run wat:train && npm run wat:infer && npm run annotate:tokenize && npm run annotate:train-bpe && npm run annotate:train && npm run annotate:infer
scripts.corpus:watnot: cd watnot && npm run build && npm run wat && npm run annotate
scripts.train:bpe: npm run corpus && npm run corpus:watnot && npm run build:train-bpe && wasmtime --dir . build/train-bpe.wasm build/tokenize.annotated.wat build/train-bpe.annotated.wat build/train.annotated.wat build/infer.annotated.wat watnot/build/watnot-annotated.wat
scripts.train: npm run build:train && wasmtime --dir . build/train.wasm build/merges.sexp build/tokenize.annotated.wat build/train-bpe.annotated.wat build/train.annotated.wat build/infer.annotated.wat watnot/build/watnot-annotated.wat
scripts.infer: npm run build:infer && wasmtime --dir . build/infer.wasm build/vocab.sexp
scripts.clean: rm -f build/merges.sexp build/vocab.sexp build/model.bin build/train-bpe.wat build/train-bpe.offsets.json build/train-bpe.annotated.wat build/train.wat build/train.offsets.json build/train.annotated.wat build/infer.wat build/infer.offsets.json build/infer.annotated.wat
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run train:bpe && npm run train && npm run infer
